name: Fig-a-ma-Jig
recipeInstructions:
1. Place fig bars on sticks.
2. Spread peanut butter evenly on the bars.
3. Put pudding in the bottom of each cup.
4. Place a fig bar in each cup.
5. Add yogurt to the cups.
6. Gently shake the cups to distribute the yogurt.
7. Sprinkle with granola or desired topping.
8. Freeze overnight.
